en: The LORD spoke to Moses and Aaron, saying,
zh: 耶和華對摩西和亞倫說：

en: "The people of Israel shall camp each by his own standard, with the banners of their fathers' houses. They shall camp facing the tent of meeting on every side.
zh: “以色列人要各歸自己的旗下，在自己父家的旗號下安營；他們要在會幕四周稍遠的地方安營。

en: Those to camp on the east side toward the sunrise shall be of the standard of the camp of Judah by their companies, the chief of the people of Judah being Nahshon the son of Amminadab,
zh: 在東方向著日出之地，按著隊伍安營的，是猶大營的旗號；猶大人的領袖是亞米拿達的兒子拿順。

en: his company as listed being 74,600.
zh: 他的隊伍被數點的，共有七萬四千六百人。

en: Those to camp next to him shall be the tribe of Issachar, the chief of the people of Issachar being Nethanel the son of Zuar,
zh: 在他旁邊安營的，是以薩迦支派；以薩迦人的領袖是蘇押的兒子拿坦業，

en: his company as listed being 54,400.
zh: 他的隊伍被數點的，共有五萬四千四百人。

en: Then the tribe of Zebulun, the chief of the people of Zebulun being Eliab the son of Helon,
zh: 又有西布倫支派；西布倫人的領袖是希倫的兒子以利押。

en: his company as listed being 57,400.
zh: 他的隊伍被數點的，共有五萬七千四百人。

en: All those listed of the camp of Judah, by their companies, were 186,400. They shall set out first on the march.
zh: 凡是屬猶大營，按著隊伍被數點的，共有十八萬六千四百人；他們要首先出發。

en: "On the south side shall be the standard of the camp of Reuben by their companies, the chief of the people of Reuben being Elizur the son of Shedeur,
zh: “在南方，按著隊伍，是流本營的旗號；流本人的領袖是示丟珥的兒子以利蓿。

en: his company as listed being 46,500.
zh: 他的隊伍被數點的，共有四萬六千五百人。

en: And those to camp next to him shall be the tribe of Simeon, the chief of the people of Simeon being Shelumiel the son of Zurishaddai,
zh: 在他旁邊安營的，是西緬支派；西緬人的領袖是蘇利沙代的兒子示路蔑。

en: his company as listed being 59,300.
zh: 他的隊伍被數點的，共有五萬九千三百人。

en: Then the tribe of Gad, the chief of the people of Gad being Eliasaph the son of Reuel,
zh: 又有迦得支派；迦得人的領袖是丟珥的兒子以利雅薩。

en: his company as listed being 45,650.
zh: 他的隊伍被數點的，共有四萬五千六百五十人。

en: All those listed of the camp of Reuben, by their companies, were 151,450. They shall set out second.
zh: 凡是屬流本營，按著隊伍被數點的，共有十五萬一千四百五十人；他們要作第二隊起行。

en: "Then the tent of meeting shall set out, with the camp of the Levites in the midst of the camps; as they camp, so shall they set out, each in position, standard by standard.
zh: “會幕和利未人的營要在眾營中間前行；他們怎樣安營，就怎樣出發前行；各按本位，各歸本旗。

en: "On the west side shall be the standard of the camp of Ephraim by their companies, the chief of the people of Ephraim being Elishama the son of Ammihud,
zh: “在西方，按著隊伍，是以法蓮營的旗號；以法蓮人的領袖是亞米忽的兒子以利沙瑪。

en: his company as listed being 40,500.
zh: 他的隊伍被數點的，共有四萬零五百人。

en: And next to him shall be the tribe of Manasseh, the chief of the people of Manasseh being Gamaliel the son of Pedahzur,
zh: 在他旁邊的，是瑪拿西支派，瑪拿西人的領袖是比大蓿的兒子迦瑪列。

en: his company as listed being 32,200.
zh: 他的隊伍被數點的，共有三萬二千二百人。

en: Then the tribe of Benjamin, the chief of the people of Benjamin being Abidan the son of Gideoni,
zh: 又有便雅憫支派；便雅憫人的領袖是基多尼的兒子亞比但。

en: his company as listed being 35,400.
zh: 他的隊伍被數點的，共有三萬五千四百人。

en: All those listed of the camp of Ephraim, by their companies, were 108,100. They shall set out third on the march.
zh: 凡是屬以法蓮營，按著隊伍被數點的，共有十萬零八千一百人；他們要作第三隊起行。

en: "On the north side shall be the standard of the camp of Dan by their companies, the chief of the people of Dan being Ahiezer the son of Ammishaddai,
zh: “在北方，按著隊伍，是但營的旗號；但人的領袖是亞米沙代的兒子亞希以謝。

en: his company as listed being 62,700.
zh: 他的隊伍被數點的，共有六萬二千七百人。

en: And those to camp next to him shall be the tribe of Asher, the chief of the people of Asher being Pagiel the son of Ochran,
zh: 在他旁邊安營的，是亞設支派；亞設人的領袖是俄蘭的兒子帕結。

en: his company as listed being 41,500.
zh: 他的隊伍被數點的，共有四萬一千五百人。

en: Then the tribe of Naphtali, the chief of the people of Naphtali being Ahira the son of Enan,
zh: 又有拿弗他利支派；拿弗他利人的領袖是以南的兒子亞希拉。

en: his company as listed being 53,400.
zh: 他的隊伍被數點的，共有五萬三千四百人。

en: All those listed of the camp of Dan were 157,600. They shall set out last, standard by standard."
zh: 凡是屬但營被數點的，共有十五萬七千六百人；他們要隨著自己的旗號，最後起行。”

en: These are the people of Israel as listed by their fathers' houses. All those listed in the camps by their companies were 603,550.
zh: 以上是照著他們的父家被數點的以色列人；所有按著他們的隊伍在眾營中被數點的，共有六十萬零三千五百五十人。

en: But the Levites were not listed among the people of Israel, as the LORD commanded Moses.
zh: 只有利未人沒有數點在以色列人中，這是耶和華吩咐摩西的。

en: Thus did the people of Israel. According to all that the LORD commanded Moses, so they camped by their standards, and so they set out, each one in his clan, according to his fathers' house.
zh: 以色列人就照著耶和華吩咐摩西的一切行了，他們隨著自己的旗號安營，各人按著自己的宗族和父家起行。
